title: 10 minutes http client timeout is too low when image generation is done on CPU
summary:
### What is the issue?

[This line](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/x/imagegen/server.go#L58) sets the 10 minute timeout regardless of the hardware.

This is maybe fine on a GPU, but is certainly too low for a CPU.
The timeout should be at least an hour or more when CPU is used.

title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] fix(nexus): support Ollama in Docker via OLLAMA_HOST env var + extend model registry
summary:
## Problem

When Nexus runs inside a Docker container, `localhost:11434` resolves to the **container itself** — not the host machine where Ollama is installed. This silently breaks all Ollama inference when running the ABI stack via Docker Compose.

Additionally, `_resolve_provider()` in `chat.py` h

title: [PR] Initial Audio-AI-Module
summary:
I worked on an AI-Module to analyze the audio files.

It uses pyhton with faster-whisper for Speech-to-Text and transcribing.
After that it uses locally running Ollama to analyze the transcript and format it into a .json file which could be used to pre-fill information into the inspection form.

title: [PR] feat: LLM chatbot with litellm tool-calling and SSE streaming
summary:
## Summary

Adds an LLM-powered threat intelligence chatbot to IntelOwl as a new Django app (`api_app/chatbot/`). Analysts can query IntelOwl's data in natural language — search jobs, retrieve reports, look up analyzers, search observables, and trigger scans — all through a streaming chat interface.

title: [PR] feat: AI Bookmark Assistant on Admin page with component refactoring
summary: Adds a natural-language AI assistant to the Admin page that interprets prompts like `"add bookmark to my proxmox server https://192.168.1.100:8006"` and executes the corresponding bookmark operation via the existing REST API. No heavy AI SDK — pure `HttpClient` against any OpenAI-compatible endpoint

title: [PR] feat: add Amazon Bedrock as inference provider
summary:
Add Bedrock's OpenAI-compatible endpoint as a first-class provider,
   enabling NemoClaw to run on AWS without GPU infrastructure.

   - Add bedrock provider config, endpoint URL, and 7 curated models
   - Add bedrock to non-interactive mode and interactive menu

title: [PR] [integrations] Fully local Docker setup with Ollama, pgvector, and management tools
summary:
Replaces Supabase + OpenRouter with a self-hosted stack:
- PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector for storage and semantic search
- Ollama with nomic-embed-text and llama3 for local AI
- Deno MCP server (adapted from server/index.ts)
- Open WebUI for Ollama management
- pgAdmin for database management
- NVIDIA GP
